x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","description":"string","config":null}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"description\":\"string\",\"config\":null}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("DELETE", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","description":"string","config":null,"parentNodeId":"string","type":"sendEmail"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"description\":\"string\",\"config\":null,\"parentNodeId\":\"string\",\"type\":\"sendEmail\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D/duplicate \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/action/%7BactionId%7D/duplicate", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

type.description: type of trigger

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","description":"string","trigger":{"name":"string","description":"string","config":null,"type":"recordCreated"}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"description\":\"string\",\"trigger\":{\"name\":\"string\",\"description\":\"string\",\"config\":null,\"type\":\"recordCreated\"}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get the currently active (published) snapshot of a workflow. Returns the version that is actually running, as opposed to the draft version returned by getWorkflow.

200.description: The active snapshot of the workflow

id.description: a unique identifier for the workflow

baseId.description: the base id of the workflow

nodes.description: nodes list include trigger and actions

lastModifiedTime.description: last modified time of the workflow

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/active-snapshot \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

put.description: active or inactive a automation workflow

method.description: Method to update the workflow, activate: activate the workflow and apply any draft if exist, deactivate: deactivate the workflow, abort: abort the draft back to the last active workflow.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/workflow/%7BworkflowId%7D/active \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"method":"activate"}'
